stemHtml: Explain the difference, if any, between climb/descent angle and flight-path angle…

options.a: Climb/descent angle is air mass related and the flight-path angle is air mass related.
options.b: Climb/descent angle is ground related and the flight-path angle is ground related.
options.c: Climb/descent angle is air mass related and the flight-path angle is ground related.
options.d: Climb/descent angle is ground related and the flight-path angle is air mass related.
